title: A Trip to the Beach
passageText: Last summer, my friends and I decided to take a trip to the coast. We left early in the morning to avoid the heavy traffic. When we arrived, the sun was shining brightly. We spent the whole day swimming in the clear blue water and building sandcastles. For lunch, we found a small seafood restaurant near the pier. The food was fresh and delicious. It was a memorable day that we will never forget.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Why did they leave early in the morning?
options: To find a good parking spot
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyatakan 'We left early in the morning to avoid the heavy traffic'.
